content_body:
Blue Ridge has plenty of outdoor activities and North Georgia Cabin Rentals to suit the needs of any adventurer, but roughing it in the wilderness is not all Blue Ridge has to offer.

Chic, sassy, smart boutique shops lining the streets of Downtown Blue Ridge would impress any world traveler. From Tupelo Teas, Blue Ridge Olive Oil Company, Blue Ridge Knife Company to Blue Ridge Adventure Outfitters, Blue Ridge Cotton Company,  Qinti-a Peruvian shop, there is something to wow everyone in your group. Explore antique shops, home decor shops, trendy clothes boutiques, wine tasting rooms, and breweries along with different eateries from hand-crafted pizzas to gourmet street tacos. 

Plan to spend the entire day in Downtown Blue Ridge, even with the kids! Plenty of entertainment to keep them happy while you shop ~ Vertigo Pinball, 2nd Story Entertainment, and Mountain Man Comics. Top off the day with a trip to Huck's General Store where you'll find barrels and displays of old-fashioned candy as well as the latest great thing! T-shirts, puzzles, games, books, specialty foods and so much more can be found in this fun shop. 

While the extensive selection of gourmet wines and numerous art galleries offer prized souvenirs, the best trinkets to bring home from your vacation are the ones that are free. Pick some wild flowers along the road at Riverview Lodge and press them into a scrapbook. During the summer season, pick some wild blackberries and make your own homemade jams to give to all your friends back home. Take a hike down Fall Branch Falls or Long Creek Falls and savor crystal clear waters while collecting smooth stones, all just minutes from Aska Escape Lodge, Blue Ridge Lake Sanctuary, Above the Timberline, Serendipity on Noontootla Creek and Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek. Little reminders of your wonderful time in Blue Ridge, GA will inspire you to make a return trip in the future.

Of course, the most precious souvenir of all, unforgettable memories of a fabulous vacation in the mountains, can be found at any one of our luxury Blue Ridge cabin rentals. Whatever your adventure may be, we understand how important your Georgia Mountain vacation is, and we can help you find everything you need to make your vacation the best it can possibly be.
title: North Georgia Cabin Rentals - Shopping in Blue Ridge
